executives.name: Arthur Levinson
executives.background: Dr. Levinson has served as the CEO of Calico, a company focused on health, well-being, and longevity, since 2013. He previously served as CEO of Genentech, Inc. from 1995 to 2009 and as its Chairman from 1999 to 2014.

executives.name: Mark Leschly
executives.background: Mark Leschly has served as a member of our Board since 2009. He is the Managing Partner of Iconica Partners and was previously a Managing Director at Rho Capital Partners.
